top_categories.workout_context: In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem's coastal roads forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 40 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before March.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
When someone attacks on coastal roads, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
2-minute all-out efforts on coastal roads. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem's coastal roads rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
At In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
40 miles on coastal roads burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
Smooth pedaling at 40 miles saves muscle. Bad technique at mile 10 is invisible. At mile 80 it's a cramp.
Varied gradients on coastal roads demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem. Train it until it feels boring.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem's coastal roads actually does to you.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem’s 40 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.terrain: Highly technical terrain at In Flanders Fields Cyclo - Wevelgem demands practice on similar surfaces. Ride coastal roads at race-day cadence weekly. Practice cornering, descending, and power delivery on unstable surfaces. Dial in tire pressure before race week — 5 PSI wrong costs you 15+ minutes over 40 miles.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Gravel Specific, Race Simulation, and Critical Power to prepare you for 40 miles of coastal roads in Wevelgem, West Flanders, Belgium.
